news.t: Trump Media just launched 5 ‘Made in America' ETFs, testing whether political power can function as an investable theme

holdings.infoBox: TSRS is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are Broadstone Net Lease stock at 8.60%, NNN REIT at 8.33%, VICI Properties at 7.28%, Realty Income at 6.73%, and Four Corners Property Trust at 6.02%.

overview.description: The Truth Social American Red State REITs ETF (TSRS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund is passively managed to provide exposure to US REITs that derive their revenues from states that have voted for a Republican presidential candidate. The portfolio is market-cap weighted. TSRS was launched on Dec 30, 2025 and is issued by Truth Social.
infoTable: MarketVector - iREIT Red State REITs Index

data.title: Trump Media just launched 5 ‘Made in America' ETFs, testing whether political power can function as an investable theme
data.text: Wall Street has seen plenty of thematic ETFs, but not one with a sitting U.S. president acting as a de facto marketing engine.

data.title: Truth Social ETFs Launch Today
